intro: Ask a question via demo button, text input or microphone. Answers come from the trade corpus ({count} documents, including official codes) — spoken through the offline chain: pre-voiced cache first, then server voice, plain text if all else fails.

offline.body: Pre-voiced audio ({count} answers in the cache) → server TTS → silence with a text answer. Answers always work — from the local knowledge corpus if it comes to that. Fill the cache: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY=… pnpm tts:cache
